CVE-2021-43668.title: Go-Ethereum 1.10.9 nodes crash (denial of service) after receivin ...
CVE-2021-43668.summary: Go-Ethereum 1.10.9 nodes crash (denial of service) after receiving a serial of messages and cannot be recovered. They will crash with "runtime error: invalid memory address or nil pointer dereference" and arise a SEGV signal.
